_comment: LBNL FDD dual-duct AHU (DDAHU) point name -> CAMBER Role mapping, at the air-handler level. A fourth BAS naming convention: a hot-deck/cold-deck dual-duct AHU with both coils and an OA economizer. The outdoor-air-fraction detector applies at the mixing box (OA/MA/RA temps + OA damper); the cold-deck discharge maps to supply_air_temp. Dataset: LBNL Fault Detection and Diagnostics Datasets (CC-BY).
